title: Udemy India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Udemy India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!
